hero.headline: Baaritaanka Waafaqsanida Sharciga ee AI-ga ku Shaqeeya
hero.subheadline: Aqoonso cilladaha nidaamka, xadgudubka xuquuqda, iyo guuldarrada waafaqsanida ee 14 qaybood oo takhasustay.

audit.title: Baaritaanka Waafaqsanida
audit.upload_hint: PDF, DOCX ama qoraal cad — amaarro maxkamad, warqado hay'ad, warbixinno booliin, qiimayn caafimaad, go'aammo CPS
audit.processing: Waa la baarayaa dukumiintiga marka loo eego halbeegyada khuseeya...

results.title: Natiijooyinka Baaritaanka
results.disclaimer: Falanqayntan waa ujeedo macluumaad oo kaliya mana aha talo sharci. La tashado qareen leh xirfad u leh go'aannada sharciga.

about.title: Ku Saabsan
about.description: Hartmann Legal Analytics waxay bixisaa baaritaanka waafaqsanida ee AI-ga ku shaqeeya ee qaybaha sharciga, xeerarka iyo hay'adaha. Waxaa lagu dhisay mishiinka falanqaynta VERNEN™, barafoormuhu wuxuu aqoonsadaa cilladaha nidaamka, xadgudubka xuquuqda iyo guuldarrada waafaqsanida ee dib-u-eegista gacanta badanaa ka maqnaato.
about.creator: Waxaa abuuray Michael Vernen Thomas Hartmann
about.methodology_desc: Dukumiinti kasta waxaa lagu baaraa halbeegga sharciga gaarka ah ee xukumay abuuristiisa — ma aha mabaadii'da guud, laakiin sharciga, xeerka ama koodka xirfadeed ee saxda ah ee khuseeya.

errors.upload_failed: Soo gelinta way guuldareysatay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
errors.file_too_large: Faylku wuu ka weyn yahay cabbirkii ugu badnaa (10 MB).
errors.unsupported_format: Qaab fayl ah oo aan la taageerin. Fadlan soo geli PDF, DOCX ama TXT.
errors.audit_failed: Hawlgelinta baaritaanka way guuldareysatay. Fadlan isku day mar kale.
errors.network_error: Khalad shabakad. Hubi xiriirkaaga oo isku day mar kale.
